title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Lendingkart - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Lendingkart - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Lendingkart family as a Backend Developer in Vadodara. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Lendingkart:
Lendingkart is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lendingkart!
